name: Beer Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450 degrees F.
2. Sift together the dry ingredients.
3. Cut in the shortening until the mixture has a cornmeal consistency.
4. Stir in the beer and knead lightly.
5. Roll out to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
6. Bake for 10 - 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
Makes 12 to 15 biscuits.
